title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING - 211info
text: WILLIAM TEMPLE HOUSE MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term counseling services, including relationship counseling, family counseling, and counseling for depression, anxiety, and bereavement. 2023 NW Hoyt Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Age 9 and older who live in low or no income households Hours: Appointments: Monday-Thursday 9am-7pm Closed New Year’s Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, President’s Day, Memorial Day, Juneteenth, 4th of July, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, day after Thanksgiving, and Christmas Day Email (503) 226-3021 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 226-3021 Main phone Main phone (503) 226-3021 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Complete a Request of Service Form on website. Walk in or call for more information. FEES: $10-$80 per person sliding scale fee, cash only. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 77 Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Bereavement and Grief Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLIAM TEMPLE HOUSE
